title: Lower Grass
description: This txt makes grass and tall grass shorter
body:
# Grass and tall grass are shorter
---
![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EYDx6PXJ/images/03dcec2fa7a1f18ded202adeef461dbbd9eadd9c.png)

## This texturepack reduces grass and tall grass so you can see more

If you want to add this txt to your modpack, feel free
